title: Nitwit's Optimized
description:
This modpack contains a selection of mods to optimize your gameplay experience!
This modpack is curated by nitwit.
Big features include: typical game optimizations, customized BetterF3, bug fixes, Craftify (music integration) and more.
body:
Welcome to Nitwit's Optimized.

This modpack contains a custom-curated selection of mods to optimize your gameplay experience!

Featured include: 
- Typical game optimizations (including [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) and [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)), 
- Customized [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) configuration, 
- General bug fix mods (like [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)), 
- [Craftify](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftify) music integration

and other useful features.

**This modpack is generally recognized as safe to use in multiplayer by it's creator, but it's creator is not liable for issues experienced in multiplayer settings (such as server bans, etc) that may stem from using this modpack in multiplayer.**

*This modpack is curated and updated by [nitwit](https://modrinth.com/user/nitwit).*
